description_long: This is a three-armed candelabrum featuring three thick, partially melted pillar candles, each set in a deep, angular metal holder. The holders are mounted on a sturdy, geometric black metal frame with a central column and three outward-curving arms, all supported by a wide, stable tripod base. The candles are off-white with visible wicks and show signs of use, as the tops are uneven and slightly melted. The metal structure has a matte, slightly rough finish, giving it a robust and somewhat industrial appearance. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for adding ambient lighting to urban environments. The candelabrum's proportions and materials suggest it is intended for placement on a table or pedestal in a public or semi-public space.
description: A sturdy black metal candelabrum with three partially melted pillar candles in angular holders, supported by a wide tripod base. The candles are off-white and show visible wicks and signs of use.
description_view_0: Three pillar candles are clearly visible, each set in a deep, angular holder atop a black metal candelabrum with a wide tripod base.
description_view_1: Two candles are visible from the side, with the third candle mostly hidden behind the central column; the angular holders and sturdy base are prominent.
description_view_2: All three candles are visible, showing their uneven, melted tops and the geometric arrangement of the holders and arms.
description_view_3: Two candles are visible from the opposite side, with the third candle mostly obscured; the tripod base and central column are clearly seen.
